name: Merge And Decor
author: Poki
description: Merge and Decor is the merge game for design lovers! Combine identical items to create upgraded furniture and stunning decor pieces. Carefully position them in the room to craft a harmonious and stylish layout. Complete each room by filling all sections, unlocking new spaces, unique elements, and exciting challenges as you progress. Ready to create the dream home everyone’s been waiting for? How to play Merge And Decor? Click and hold to select an item, drag them to merge or place them. Who created Merge And Decor? Merge And Decor is created by Being Gaming. This is their first game on Poki! How can I play Merge And Decor for free? You can play Merge And Decor for free on Poki. Can I play Merge And Decor on mobile devices and desktop? Merge And Decor can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
